overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt walking along a stormy beach at night with a torch, then moving inland through grassy meadows and onto a dirt path. The scene features heavy rain, dark storm clouds, and transitions from coastal to inland terrain while maintaining a dark, atmospheric mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy beach shoreline with ocean view

events.description: character begins walking along the shoreline after standing still
moving away from the water's edge toward the grassy inland

agents.ego_description: walking along the stormy beach with a torch, observing the ocean waves and distant castle ruins

entered.detail: dark choppy ocean waves crashing on the shore
large castle structure visible across the water on a distant hill
wet sand along the water's edge where the character walks
dark heavy storm clouds covering the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a stormy beach at night, holding a torch that illuminates the immediate area. The ocean surf crashes to the left while a distant castle ruin is visible across the water. The character begins walking along the shoreline, moving away from the water toward an inland grassy area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with wildflowers and scattered trees

events.description: character climbs up from the beach onto grassy terrain
character transitions from walking to jogging up the slope

agents.ego_description: climbing up the embankment from the beach into a meadow filled with white wildflowers and bushes

entered.detail: lush green grass covering the inland terrain
patches of white flowers scattered throughout the grass
tall thin dark trees standing on the right side of the meadow
green shrubbery and bushes dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: Leaving the beach behind, the character ascends a grassy slope into a meadow filled with white wildflowers. Tall cypress trees stand against the stormy sky as the character jogs through the vegetation. The ocean disappears from view as the terrain becomes fully inland grassland.

events.description: terrain transitions from grass to a defined dirt road

agents.ego_description: trekking steadily along a dirt path through the stormy night, torchlight illuminating the road ahead

entered.detail: worn dirt road cutting through the grassland
rocks and stones scattered along the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a dirt path that winds through the open countryside. The terrain becomes drier with sparse vegetation lining the road. The character continues walking steadily along the path through the persistent rain and wind, with the torch providing the only warm light in the cool blue stormy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stormy coastline that gradually transitions into a desolate inland countryside. It begins on a dark beach where the character holds a torch against the crashing ocean surf and the silhouette of a distant castle ruin. As the character moves away from the shoreline, the scene shifts upward onto a grassy slope, passing through a meadow of white wildflowers and tall cypress trees until the ocean disappears from view. The terrain then opens into a wide expanse of grassland before the character reaches a winding dirt path. Finally, the camera follows the steady walk along this road through persistent rain and wind, with the torch remaining the sole source of warm light against the cool blue of the stormy night.
